description: Configure a shared Chrome browser terminal in a ski patrol dispatch room. Organize critical life-safety bookmarks, quarantine distracting recreational sites, configure multi-tab startup routines for morning avalanche briefings, and implement strict 'clear-on-exit' privacy settings to prevent stale telemetry caching.
instruction: A configuration standard is located at ~/Desktop/dispatch_terminal_spec.txt. Follow it strictly: categorize the 30 scattered bookmarks into specific folders on the bookmark bar, configure the startup sequence to open 3 specific forecasting URLs, adjust the download path, and lock down privacy/credential settings for a shared workstation.
